case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JULIANN TERESA FUENTES et al

docket_entries.description: POS; DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT A COPY OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, JULIANN TERESA
